summary: Audited all 14 phases of PLAN.md against the codebase. All 4 critical integration gaps and all 5 remaining items now fully resolved. Zero open issues.

fixed_issues.title: Build node type dispatch was a TODO stub — type factories never called
fixed_issues.description: 5 type factory modules existed in building_blocks/types/ (wall_types, column_types, beam_types, door_types, window_types) with 10 factory functions, but agent/nodes/build.py line 78 had `types[type_def.type_ref] = None  # TODO: dispatch to type factory`. All elements received wall_type=None, col_type=None, etc. No material layer sets, no material profile sets, no type standardization.
fixed_issues.fix: Added _create_type() dispatcher with _TYPE_FACTORIES (preset→factory) and _CLASS_DEFAULT_FACTORY (ifc_class→factory) lookup tables. Supports 14 preset names + 5 class defaults. Falls back gracefully (unknown preset→class default→None). Custom params forwarded to factory kwargs.

fixed_issues.title: web/types/building.ts missing ElevatorPlacement
fixed_issues.description: Python agent/schemas.py had ElevatorPlacement model and the build node handled it, but the TypeScript mirror type file web/types/building.ts did not include ElevatorPlacement in the interface or union type.
fixed_issues.fix: Added ElevatorPlacement interface with element_type, storey_ref, position, width, depth, name fields. Added to ElementPlacement union type.

fixed_issues.title: Orphaned frontend libraries — toPlanJSON.ts, usePascalEditor.ts never imported
fixed_issues.description: web/lib/toPlanJSON.ts (Pascal editor→BuildingPlan converter) and web/hooks/usePascalEditor.ts (Zustand store) were written but never imported by any component. VisualEditor.tsx was a static placeholder with no interactivity.
fixed_issues.fix: Rewrote VisualEditor.tsx to import and use usePascalEditor hook and toPlanJSON converter. Added Clear and Generate buttons (visible when nodes exist). Wired onPlanGenerated callback in page.tsx to dispatch build-from-plan jobs.

fixed_issues.title: shadcn/ui not installed — plan requires it, no ui/ directory existed
fixed_issues.description: PLAN.md §9.2 specifies installing shadcn/ui components. Package prerequisites (cva, clsx, tailwind-merge, tailwindcss-animate, cn() utility) were already present but no components.json and no web/components/ui/ directory existed.
fixed_issues.fix: Created components.json config. Created 6 shadcn/ui components: Button (with variants), Input, Textarea, Badge (with success/warning variants for BIM), Card (with Header/Title/Description/Content/Footer), Separator. Installed @radix-ui/react-slot and @radix-ui/react-separator dependencies. All components use the project's BIM dark palette (accent, surface, border, muted, etc.).

remaining_issues.title: JWT auth (verify_token) applied to all authenticated API routes
remaining_issues.description: Added Depends(verify_token) to generate, build_from_plan, modify, and voice endpoints. Auth is optional (returns None if no token) so dev still works unauthenticated.

remaining_issues.title: Auth pages created (login/register)
remaining_issues.description: Created web/app/(auth)/login/page.tsx and register/page.tsx with Supabase auth, shadcn/ui components, Framer Motion animations, and BIM dark palette.

remaining_issues.title: Supabase Storage upload_ifc() implemented
remaining_issues.description: Created api/storage.py with lazy Supabase client init, upload to ifc-files bucket, and signed URL generation (1hr expiry). Falls back to None when Supabase not configured.

remaining_issues.title: Assemblies module fully implemented — 6 modules
remaining_issues.description: Implemented all 6 assembly modules: structural_grid (column+beam grids), stair_core (enclosure+flight+railings+landing), toilet_core (walls+door+IfcSpace), apartment_unit (perimeter+partition+door+windows+spaces), facade_bay (wall+distributed windows+spandrel), roof_assembly (flat/pitched+parapets/railings). Fixed IfcSpace containment (uses aggregate.assign_object, not spatial.assign_container).

remaining_issues.title: web/lib/supabase.ts now consumed by auth pages
remaining_issues.description: Both login and register pages import and use the Supabase browser client for signInWithPassword and signUp.

phase_1_building_blocks.primitives: complete (15 files + elevator + ramp + covering = 17 primitives)
phase_1_building_blocks.types: complete (5 type modules, now wired into build node)
phase_1_building_blocks.assemblies: complete (6/6 modules: structural_grid, stair_core, toilet_core, apartment_unit, facade_bay, roof_assembly)
phase_1_building_blocks.psets: complete (8 helpers, all called by primitives)
phase_1_building_blocks.bsdd: complete (wired into clarify node, semantic_checks, API routes)

implementation_status.phase_2_api: complete (7 routes registered + storage module, all routes have JWT auth)
implementation_status.phase_3_agent: complete (7 nodes, graph with repair loop, 3 pipeline entry points)
implementation_status.validation: complete (4-layer: plan_checks, schema_check, IDS, semantic_checks with 13 checks)
